name: useSpeechRecognition
description: Hook that provides a streamlined interface for incorporating speech-to-text functionality
examples: const { supported, value, recognition, listening, error, start, stop, toggle  } = useSpeechRecognition();

parameters.name: options.continuous
parameters.description: Whether recognition should continue after pauses

source.source: * @param {boolean} [options.continuous=false] Whether recognition should continue after pauses

tokens.name: [options.continuous=false]
tokens.description: Whether recognition should continue after pauses

parameters.name: options.interimResults
parameters.description: Whether interim results should be provided

source.source: * @param {boolean} [options.interimResults=false] Whether interim results should be provided

tokens.name: [options.interimResults=false]
tokens.description: Whether interim results should be provided

parameters.name: options.language
parameters.description: The language for recognition, as a valid BCP 47 tag

source.source: * @param {string} [options.language="en-US"] The language for recognition, as a valid BCP 47 tag

tokens.name: [options.language="en-US"]
tokens.description: The language for recognition, as a valid BCP 47 tag

parameters.name: options.maxAlternatives
parameters.description: The maximum number of alternative transcripts to return

source.source: * @param {number} [options.maxAlternatives=1] The maximum number of alternative transcripts to return

tokens.name: [options.maxAlternatives=1]
tokens.description: The maximum number of alternative transcripts to return
